description: Create a music royalty calculation pipeline in DBeaver using the Chinook database located at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Establish a connection named 'ChinookRoyalty' and create a table named 'royalty_rates' with columns RateId (PK), MinRevenue, MaxRevenue, RoyaltyPercent, and TierName, populated with tiers for Bronze ($0-$10, 10%), Silver ($10.01-$50, 15%), Gold ($50.01-$200, 20%), and Platinum (>$200.01, 25%). Generate a table 'artist_monthly_royalties' that calculates monthly gross revenue and corresponding royalties for each artist by joining the Artists, Albums, Tracks, InvoiceItems, and Invoices tables. Export a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/royalty_summary.csv including ArtistName, TotalGrossRevenue, TotalRoyalties, MonthsActive, AvgMonthlyRevenue, and MostCommonTier, sorted by TotalRoyalties descending. Save the complete SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/royalty_calculation.sql.
